scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @seoforge/core && npm run build -w @seoforge/seo-geo && npm run build -w @seoforge/integrations && npm run build -w @seoforge/agent-runtime && npm run build -w @seoforge/repo-runner && npm run build -w @seoforge/sdk
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @seoforge/web && npm run build -w @seoforge/worker && npm run build -w @seoforge/runner-service && npm run build -w @seoforge/cli && npm run build -w @seoforge/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w @seoforge/web && npm run typecheck -w @seoforge/worker && npm run typecheck -w @seoforge/runner-service && npm run typecheck -w @seoforge/cli && npm run typecheck -w @seoforge/mcp
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
